speaker: speaker1
text: Hi . I need to have my shoes repaired .

speaker: speaker2
text: What ’ s the matter with them ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Look at the heels . They are slanting .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ah , I can do it perfectly .

speaker: speaker2
text: 6 yuan . And I can make them as new as before .

speaker: speaker1
text: I think it ’ s too expensive . I can just give you 4 yuan . Or I ’ ll go to another B .

speaker: speaker2
text: All right . I ’ ll repair them for you .

speaker: speaker1
text: How long will it take ? Could you repair them while I wait ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . They will be ready in a few minutes .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great ! I ’ ll just sit here and wait .
